project_context.name: FAQ Customer Resolver
project_context.mission: Resolve customer queries about platform usage, refunds, and integrations autonomously.
project_context.vision: Provide instant, empathetic, and accurate support assistance 24/7.
project_context.problem_statement: Support ticket backlog leads to customer frustration and delayed responses.

semantic.fact: Refund requests are processed automatically if submitted within 14 days of purchase and usage metrics are low.

episodic.outcome: User confirmed refund policy was clear and closed the chat
